name: Raspberry Nut Cake
recipeInstructions:
----------------------------------FROSTING----------------------------------
1. In a bowl, cream butter or margarine and salt until light.
2. Gradually add powdered sugar, alternating with pureed raspberries and 2-3 tablespoons of hot cream. Add vanilla; beat until smooth.
3. Mix dry ingredients (flour, baking powder, soda, salt, cinnamon).
4. In another bowl, cream sugar and Crisco until fluffy.
5. Beat in eggs and vanilla.
6. Gradually add the dry mixture to the Crisco mixture, alternating with buttermilk or sour milk.
7. Fold in nuts and raspberries.
8. Pour batter into 2 greased 8-inch layer pans.
9. Bake at 350°F (175°C) for 30-40 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
10. Allow to cool completely before frosting.
Pink Raspberry Frosting: Cream butter or margarine and salt. Gradually add powdered sugar, alternating with pureed raspberries and hot cream. Add vanilla; beat until smooth. Spread over cooled cake.
